heroes.name: Lucifer
heroes.summary: Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better

heroes.name: Hela
heroes.summary: Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better

heroes.name: Victoria
heroes.summary: Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better

heroes.name: Babylon
heroes.summary: Must have for both PVP & PVE [RO] - Bunch of actions and DMG boost

heroes.name: Arcane Dorabella
heroes.summary:
Top tier both PVP & PVE - A must have hero for everything
10-stars only for PVP, for everything else 9-stars is enough

heroes.name: Asmodeus
heroes.summary: A better Gaia starting at 8-stars, and a far better Gaia at 10-stars and above, especially with exclusive runes.

heroes.name: Primordial Arkdina
heroes.summary: Top PVP hero - a must have for both WA & Foggy competition, key part of many teams for survival

heroes.name: Venus
heroes.summary: Makes Ethereals deadly in PVP - close to unbeatable, her Oath Force isn't all that "justified" as it is for the others

heroes.name: Izanami
heroes.summary: Expected to be slighly better damage booster than Elisha at the high investment; should be top tier in both PVP & PVE.

heroes.name: Hera
heroes.summary: Top PVP hero - a must have for both WA & Foggy competition, key part in Avenger - Phantoms and only really usable there.

heroes.name: Eve
heroes.summary: The strongest Mystifier hero in the game right now, if you want your Mystifiers to have any odds of winning, you'll want her.

heroes.name: Tiamat
heroes.summary: Often mandatory hero for the RO boss stages, other than that she's a key part of Mystifier's team in the PVP

heroes.name: Ascended Bastett
heroes.summary: After the recent hotfix on her Oath force, she's quite OP in Mystifiers.

heroes.name: Sourceborn Marina
heroes.summary: Unique Oath Force; countering PI reliably and bringing +2 Glorians is insane value - only for PVP players. She doesn't bring a lot of value, if any, in PVE.

heroes.name: Behemoth
heroes.summary: Strong Oath Force - Strong hero.

heroes.name: Sovereign Aiushtha
heroes.summary: Oath Force is barely felt in her case after the loss of seasonal stats, only worth getting up to 9-stars for the +2 Dooms.

heroes.name: Everhunt Diana
heroes.summary: Solid in PVP and high-end PVE [Palace/LC/RO] - other than that, she's easily replaced by Ophelia in PVE, so this hero is mostly for low-spenders, for F2P's only ok to invest if already own her at 6-stars.

heroes.name: Loki
heroes.summary: A perfect balance between PVP and PVE; filler hero that slots majority of the teams.

heroes.name: Jormungand
heroes.summary: Oath Force is okay-ish hence why the 'Middle' tier - only worth taking if you're done with the majority of the heroes at above

heroes.name: Leviathan
heroes.summary: Terrible Oath force; peaks at 9-stars due to her reflect skill, should stay at that until she's more viable in shops & selectors.

heroes.name: Amaterasu
heroes.summary: Worth investing if Venus is acquired, but not a "must-own"

heroes.name: Isis
heroes.summary: Strong Oath force, strong hero - but a bit old, hard to justify spending Oracles on her when there's better heroes in the shop to work towards.

heroes.name: Susanoo
heroes.summary: A mid hero due to her Oath force "not working" and poor synergy, only viable as a CC cleanser for burst-like teams.

heroes.name: Ying Zheng
heroes.summary: Only worth investing once you enter the PVP competitive zone, completely useless in PVE and only serves as an Avenger filler hero that is often crucial for the battle win/loss

heroes.name: Odin
heroes.summary: Only worth getting up to 10-stars for PVP; otherwise keep her at 9-stars.

heroes.name: Tsukuyomi
heroes.summary: Good Oath Force but the difference between 7 to 12-stars is really small, not justified the investment until she becomes "easier" to get.

heroes.name: Death Knight
heroes.summary: Only really good with E. Diana & Pandora in PVP/PVE, not really a mandatory hero for anything, skippable, but good to have "just in case" at 9-stars for the future.

heroes.name: Eudora
heroes.summary: Outdated & replaced by Arc. Dorabella; still a good hero for 2nd Ethereals, unfortunately requires Legendary Exclusive Runes to be viable & skin for PVP.

heroes.name: Pandora
heroes.summary: Her Oath force doesn't justify the investment; long-term, you'll get her up to 12-stars with the free selectors from RO/events

heroes.name: Elisha
heroes.summary: Oath Force is bad - but okay now due to Venus, only justifiable going above 8-stars to 10-stars in a case with Venus.

heroes.name: Gaia
heroes.summary: Pretty terrible Oath Force, hard to justify spending any Oracle Coins for her, work with RO selectors

heroes.name: Cleopatra
heroes.summary: Outdated, only used in PVP as a filler and Tombs or PVE for more than 4-team content.

heroes.name: Bahamut
heroes.summary: Solid in Protectors for providing CC + 3 Glorians [if EX'd] but not a good Oath Force

heroes.name: Lilith
heroes.summary: Only used in the Ethereals as a filler - not mandatory, hard to fit in other teams, also has terrible Oath Force

heroes.name: Hecate
heroes.summary: Hard to fit in any Avengers due to poor rune synergy, good hero done wrong, not worth summoning on

heroes.name: RA
heroes.summary: It's only usability is RO but even then is not a must, skip - on top of that her Oath Force is bad

heroes.name: Fenrir
heroes.summary: Only usable on whale accounts and even then there's better options, skip unless you wanna be funny
